violations.text: Raw animal foods (eggs were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Proper storage reviewed with PIC. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2024
The condensate from the walk-in refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2024
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2024

Raw animal foods (eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2024
Rodenticide was observed stored on the ground in the basement. Rodenticide to be disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2024

Food packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2024
Glue traps were observed with a large accumulation of trapped insects. Glue traps must be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2024
A cat was observed inside the establishment. Cat was removed from premises. Scratching post was observed in basement. Post to be removed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2024
The condensate from the produce walk-in refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2024
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2024
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by various equipment. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

Various baked goods products were observed without a label. Per PIC, products were purchased from a bakery in New York. PIC was unable to provide any additional information on product. Product was placed under embargo until additional information is available. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024

Sliced meats packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024
Boxes of food were observed stored on the floor in the retail area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2024
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2024
